headline: American Electric Power (AEP) Joins Bloom Expansion To Power AI Data Centers
summary: Bloom Energy and Brookfield are expanding fuel cell infrastructure to support rising AI data center power needs. American Electric Power Company (NasdaqGS:AEP) is identified as a key partner in this global buildout. The collaboration focuses on next-generation power solutions tailored to large scale computing facilities. American Electric Power Company sits at the center of a growing push to secure reliable electricity for AI data centers, an area that requires high uptime and substantial...
